title: rna_targeting_small_molecule_v1 — RNA-TARGETING-SMALL-MOLECULE sub-axis output rows
description: Output-row contract for the RNA-TARGETING-SMALL-MOLECULE sub-axis ( :> RIBOZYME core axis ). A row records one in-silico simulation of how a small molecule that binds an RNA structural motif shifts the RNA secondary-structure ensemble: a baseline Nussinov fold, a ligand-bound fold under a binding constraint, and the resulting structural shift in an exon-inclusion-relevant stem. Real-limit anchor: RNA secondary-structure thermodynamics (Nussinov 1978 SIAM J Appl Math 35:68; Turner-Mathews NNDB 2010 NAR 38:D280). Modality precedent: risdiplam/Evrysdi (small-molecule SMN2 exon-7 splicing modulator, FDA 2020) + branaplam — cited for modality only, never lattice-derived (governance g3/f1/f_lattice_fit). Every PASS = in-silico simulator+metadata consistency ONLY, never a therapeutic/clinical/efficacy claim (governance g8/f2). Emitted by _python_bridge/module/rna_targeting_small_molecule_sim.py.

sub_axis.description: This sub-axis name. It is a specialization sub-axis, NOT a core-5 axis.

parent_axis.description: The core-5 axis this sub-axis specializes ( :> RIBOZYME ). RIBOZYME = catalytic RNA; this sub = small molecules targeting RNA structure. The core-5 RIBOZYME axis is UNCHANGED by this sub-axis.

modality_precedent.description: The sub-axis modality described ONLY via its own published drug precedent (risdiplam/Evrysdi, branaplam). Never an n=6-lattice derivation (g3/f1/f_lattice_fit).

transcript_length_nt.description: Length of the toy pre-mRNA transcript in nucleotides.

exon_inclusion_stem.description: Half-open index window [lo,hi) of the exon-inclusion-relevant stem — the structural proxy for the splice-relevant conformation.

ligand_mode.description: stabilizer = ligand pushes the ensemble toward the inclusion-competent fold (risdiplam-like); destabilizer = ligand pushes it away.

baseline.description: RNA secondary-structure ensemble with NO ligand bound.

ligand_bound.description: RNA secondary-structure ensemble folded under the small-molecule binding constraint.

structural_shift.description: Change in the exon-inclusion stem, baseline -> ligand-bound.

ensemble_stem_fraction_delta.description: Difference in the Boltzmann-style ensemble stem fraction.

direction_consistent.description: true iff a stabilizer did not reduce the stem (shift >= 0) or a destabilizer did not increase it (shift <= 0). In-silico self-consistency check only.

real_limit_anchor.description: The cited real limit this row is anchored to (RNA secondary-structure thermodynamics — Nussinov 1978 base-pair maximization; Turner-Mathews NNDB 2010 nearest-neighbor / Boltzmann ensemble).

in_silico_only.description: Always true. A PASS verifies in-silico simulator+metadata internal consistency ONLY — never a therapeutic, clinical, splicing-correction, efficacy, or regulatory claim (governance g8/f2).

dot_bracket.description: Vienna dot-bracket notation; length == transcript_length_nt; balanced.

total_pairs.description: Total base pairs in this structure.

stem_paired_nt.description: Count of exon-inclusion-stem positions that are base-paired.

ensemble_stem_fraction.description: Boltzmann-style ensemble-weighted paired fraction of the exon-inclusion stem over enumerated competing structures (soft surrogate for a Turner-NN ΔG weighting).
